# GitHub Repository Description

## Short About

Локальна MVP/demo ERP-система для ФОП: замовлення, склад, закупівлі, виробництво, календар, Telegram-бот і AI-асистент.

## Extended Description

Universal AI Order & Production Assistant is a local-first MVP/demo ERP workspace for small businesses that need to manage client orders, stock balances, purchase planning, production, write-offs, reports, Telegram bot intake, and AI-assisted business actions from one cabinet.

The current demo is configured for a pastry workflow, but the structure is designed to be universal: tomorrow it can be adapted for a workshop, decor production, kitchen, small factory, or any business with materials, orders, recipes, reservations, and fulfillment.

## Suggested Topics

erp, inventory, production, procurement, order-management, telegram-bot, ai-assistant, small-business, local-first, ukrainian
